description: Microchip MCP3008 8-channel 10-bit ADC (start-bit + channel command). Migrated as stream proto for schema; runtime semantics may need per-stimulus command key revision.
fault_detect_note: MCP3008 is a passive 10-bit ADC with no WHOAMI, status register, checksum, or reserved-bit pattern. MISO stuck high returns raw=0x3FF which is a legitimate full-scale reading — physically indistinguishable from a bogus 0xFF. No correct driver can detect this class of fault on this device, so L5 SPI MISO-stuck-high is marked not-applicable rather than silently rewarded.
